description: Configure your domain to send and receive email with Deepbluework. Sets up MX, SPF, DKIM, DMARC, and BIMI records.
variableDescription: dkimSelector: DKIM selector assigned by Deepbluework; dkimValue: full DKIM TXT record value; dmarcValue: DMARC policy record value (p=quarantine or p=reject required for BIMI); bimiLogoUrl: HTTPS URL to the BIMI-compliant SVG logo for this domain.

variables.name: dkimSelector
variables.description: DKIM selector name assigned by Deepbluework

variables.name: dkimValue
variables.description: Full DKIM TXT record value (v=DKIM1; k=rsa; p=...)

variables.name: dmarcValue
variables.description: DMARC policy record value (must include p=quarantine or p=reject for BIMI to work)

variables.name: bimiLogoUrl
variables.description: HTTPS URL to the domain's BIMI-compliant SVG logo (SVG Tiny 1.2, square)
